sprints.name: Foundation
sprints.summary: Repository bootstrap, core public packages, internal docs, CLI scaffolding, and the first runnable example

deliverables.item: Go project scaffolding (go.mod, go.sum, .gitignore, Makefile, README, LICENSE)
Internal documentation layout aligned with crit-ide (PRD, package docs, spec docs, progress tracking)
Public foundation packages: geom, scene, input, physics, whisky
Project config format via whisky.json
CLI commands: whisky new, whisky run, whisky doctor
Embedded starter-project templates and local replace-aware scaffolding
Starter example project: pixel-quest
Unit test coverage for geom, input, scene, physics, and project scaffolding

cli_commands.whisky new <name-or-path>: Create a new Whisky game project and run go mod tidy inside it
cli_commands.whisky run [dir]: Run a Whisky project using the entry_point declared in whisky.json
cli_commands.whisky doctor: Inspect Go, git, pkg-config, SDL3, and OpenGL availability

sprints.name: Native Runtime
sprints.summary: SDL3 window bootstrap, event pump, close flow, and on-screen debug overlay

deliverables.item: SDL3 dynamic library loading through go-sdl3
Main-thread runtime contract in whisky.Run
Window creation and teardown lifecycle
Event polling for window close and Escape key
Debug overlay rendering with SDL renderer text
Headless escape hatch for automation via WHISKY_HEADLESS
Input event mapping from SDL events into engine input actions
Window resize awareness and virtual-resolution policy

sprints.name: 2D Renderer
sprints.summary: Visible world rendering, camera, and first sprite-capable pipeline

deliverables.item: Renderer abstraction between runtime and draw pipeline
Primitive 2D rendering for rectangles and lines
Camera2D and virtual resolution transform
Texture loading and sprite drawing
First visible pixel-quest scene beyond debug text

sprints.name: Gameplay Systems
sprints.summary: Engine-facing game building blocks for a real 2D prototype

deliverables.item: Scene components for renderable objects
Action-oriented keyboard input bindings
Collision resolution on top of the current query world
Simple trigger and pickup workflow
Sample gameplay loop with controllable player

sprints.name: Assets and Content
sprints.summary: File-backed content pipeline for a usable 2D engine slice

deliverables.item: Texture asset loading from PNG
Audio asset loading for WAV or OGG
Font or text rendering path beyond debug overlay
Asset cache and invalidation hooks
Reserved assets directory conventions in generated projects

sprints.name: Tooling and DX
sprints.summary: Developer workflow improvements around project creation, iteration, and diagnostics

deliverables.item: Project templates for additional game styles
Hot reload for file-backed assets
Richer whisky doctor output with OS-specific guidance
Build and release scripts for example binaries

sprints.name: Pixel Quest Vertical Slice
sprints.summary: Turn the sample into a small but actually game-like validation target

deliverables.item: Visible map and player sprite
Keyboard movement
Trigger, pickup, and simple objective
Sound effect and background music
End-to-end sample that validates public APIs only
